ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the country's name */,
  "code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "iso_numeric" INTEGER /* ISO numeric code for the country */,
  "land_area_km" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "groups" TEXT /* Special groups or affiliations of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent FOREIGN KEY ("continent") REFERENCES continents ("continent_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "descripttion" TEXT /* Brief description of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group or affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_continents" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries_groups" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country in that year */,
  "land_area_km" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers in that year */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP of the country in that year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasted data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is forecasted */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country in that year */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP of the country in that year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_forecast_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
